parameters.name: list_workspaces
parameters.description: List all Asana workspaces the token has access to. No parameters. Use this first when you need a workspace gid for other calls.

parameters.name: list_projects
parameters.description: List projects in a workspace. Parameters: workspace (required, workspace gid), archived (optional 'true'/'false', default 'false'), limit (optional, default 20, max 100).

value.archived: ={{ $fromAI('archived', 'Include archived projects: true or false (default false)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: get_project
parameters.description: Get full details of a project including notes, owner, due date, members. Parameters: project (required, project gid).

parameters.name: list_sections
parameters.description: List sections (columns) of a project. Parameters: project (required, project gid).

parameters.name: list_tasks
parameters.description: List tasks with ONE of these filters: project (by project gid), section (by section gid), OR assignee+workspace (use 'me' for the current user). Parameters: project, section, assignee, workspace, limit (default 20), completed_since (ISO 8601, e.g. 'now' for only open tasks).

value.completed_since: ={{ $fromAI('completed_since', "ISO date or 'now' for only incomplete tasks", 'string') }}

parameters.name: get_task
parameters.description: Get full task details: name, notes, assignee, due date, projects, tags, subtasks. Parameters: task (required, task gid).

parameters.name: create_task
parameters.description: Create a new task. Parameters: name (required), workspace OR project (at least one required), notes (optional), assignee (optional, gid or 'me'), due_on (optional, YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: update_task
parameters.description: Update an existing task. Parameters: task (required, task gid), plus at least one of: name, notes, assignee, due_on (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: complete_task
parameters.description: Mark a task as completed. Parameters: task (required, task gid).

parameters.name: add_comment_to_task
parameters.description: Add a comment (story) to a task. Parameters: task (required, task gid), text (required, comment body).
